basic_details.job_title: RINL Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for RHOs & Visiting Specialist Posts
basic_details.short_information: Rashtriya Ispat Nigam (RINL) Resident House Officer / Visiting Specialist Notification 2026 has been released on 07-05-2026 on the official website vizagsteel.com. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the RINL Resident House Officer / Visiting Specialist Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 35 years of age who have MBBS (MCI Recognized) or Post Graduate Degree/Diploma in relevant specialty are eligible to apply for these Resident House Officer / Visiting Specialist vacancies. The walk-in interview process for RINL Resident House Officer / Visiting Specialist Recruitment 2026 will b

age_limit.age_details: Max: 35 years (Relaxation by 5yrs for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years as on 01 May 2026. Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST candidates and 3 years for OBC candidates (for RHOs).

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS (MCI Recognized) for RHOs, Post Graduate degree/Diploma in relevant specialty with minimum 3 months experience for Visiting Specialists
qualification.details: Resident House Officer: MBBS (MCI Recognized) Visiting Specialist (General Surgery): Post Graduate degree / Diploma from a recognized University. Minimum 3 months experience in the professional work related to concerned specialty after obtaining PG degree/Diploma. Visiting Specialist (General Medicine): Post Graduate degree / Diploma from a recognized University. Minimum 3 months experience in the professional work related to concerned specialty after obtaining PG degree/Diploma. Visiting Specialist (Anesthesia): Post Graduate degree / Diploma from a recognized University. Minimum 3 months experience in the professional work related to concerned specialty after obtaining PG degree/Diploma. Visiting Specialist (Radiology): Post Graduate degree / Diploma from a recognized University. Minimum 3 months experience in the professional work related to concerned specialty after obtaining PG degree/Diploma. In case of Radiology/Ultrasonology, where suitable candidates with PG degree or Diploma holders are not available, MBBS Doctors trained in Radiology/Ultrasonology & registered with DM & HO may be considered.

salary_details.details: Resident House Officer: Rs.50,000/- per month

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for RINL recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for RINL recruitment is scheduled for 14 May 2026. Candidates are advised to report for registration between 09:00 AM and 11:00 AM on the same day.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for Resident House Officer?
faq.answer: For the Resident House Officer post, candidates must possess an MBBS degree recognized by the Medical Council of India (MCI).

faq.question: Q3. Are there any application fees for the RINL recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the RINL recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 35 years as of 01 May 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST and OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for both Resident House Officer and Visiting Specialist posts will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 50,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for RINL recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these positions will be based on a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the RINL office in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, with the pincode 530032.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates with a Post Graduate Diploma apply for Visiting Specialist roles?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with a Post Graduate degree or Diploma in the relevant specialty, along with a minimum of 3 months of experience, are eligible to apply for Visiting Specialist positions.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any specific time for registration and interview on the walk-in date?
faq.answer: Yes, registration will be conducted from 09:00 AM to 11:00 AM, and the interview will take place from 11:00 AM to 02:00 PM on 14 May 2026.
